title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Kenya, you're probably all too familiar with the frustration of not being able to sell your design assets online due to PayPal's restrictions on Kenyan accounts. You've tried to set up a Stripe account, but that's been rejected too. You've even attempted to use Gumroad, but their fees are too high and their payment processing is always a gamble. Meanwhile, your competitors are raking it in, and you're left wondering how they're able to make it happen. The truth is, they're using crypto payments to bypass the traditional payment processors and reach their customers directly. And you can do the same.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

So, what exactly is a crypto payment system? It's a way for you to sell your design assets online and receive payments directly from your customers, without the need for a traditional payment processor like PayPal or Stripe. This means that you can reach customers in countries where these payment processors are restricted, and you can avoid the high fees associated with traditional payment processing. But here's the thing: it's not just about escaping the restrictions and fees - it's also about giving your customers the freedom to pay the way they want to. By using a crypto payment system, you're giving your customers the option to pay with their preferred cryptocurrency, whether that's Bitcoin, Ethereum, or something else. And that's a big deal, because it means that you can tap into a whole new market of customers who are eager to pay with crypto.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind a crypto payment system is based on blockchain, a decentralized and secure way of storing and transferring data. When a customer makes a payment, their cryptocurrency is sent to your wallet, and then it's automatically converted to USD at the current exchange rate. This means that you can receive payments in your preferred currency, without having to worry about the volatility of cryptocurrency prices. But here's the really cool thing about crypto payment systems: they're based on open-source technology, which means that developers are able to customize and extend the system to meet their specific needs. For example, you can use Web3 Wallet Connect to integrate a crypto payment system into your website or application, giving your customers a seamless and secure way to make payments. By using open-source technology, you can take control of your payment processing and customize it to fit your business needs.
Who This Is Built For and Why

So, who is this crypto payment system built for? It's built for digital creators like you, who are looking for a way to sell their design assets online and receive payments directly from their customers. It's also built for solo developers who are looking to integrate a crypto payment system into their applications. And it's built for anyone who wants to tap into the growing market of customers who are eager to pay with cryptocurrency. By using a crypto payment system, you can reach a whole new market of customers and increase your revenue. And that's a big deal, because it means that you can focus on doing what you do best: creating amazing design assets and selling them to customers who love them. By using a crypto payment system, you can take control of your payment processing and customize it to fit your business needs.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

A crypto payment system is made up of several components that work together to make it all happen. There's the wallet, which is where your customers' cryptocurrencies are stored. There's the payment processor, which is responsible for converting the cryptocurrency to USD. And there's the integration, which is how the payment processor talks to your website or application. By using Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate a crypto payment system into your website or application and give your customers a seamless and secure way to make payments. And by using a payment processor like NOWPayments, you can convert your cryptocurrency payments to USD at the current exchange rate. By using these components together, you can create a crypto payment system that is secure, customizable, and easy to use.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

So, now that you know what a crypto payment system is and how it works, it's time to take action. The first step is to get set up with a wallet, either by using Web3 Wallet Connect or by setting up your own wallet with a cryptocurrency exchange. Next, you'll need to integrate a payment processor into your website or application, using a platform like NOWPayments. Once you've done that, you can start accepting cryptocurrency payments from your customers. And the best part is, you can do it all without having to worry about the complex technical details. By using a crypto payment system, you can focus on what you do best: creating amazing design assets and selling them to customers who love them. So, what are you waiting for? Get started today and take control of your payment processing.

Your Action Checklist

Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
